main.description: Mint a delegation token for a space, proving the application is acting on the user's behalf when it asks the space authority for a space credential. The token is single-use, short-lived, and addressed to the space authority. Requires a covering OAuth scope with a read grant; served by the requesting user's PDS.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

token.description: Delegation token (JWT) signed by the account's signing key.
